title: VolunteerModule
description: Domain knowledge for a single volunteer speciality. Contains no questions or scoring — the application generates exercises from this content.

id.description: Unique slug for this module. Must match the filename (e.g. 'registration' for registration.yaml).

name.description: Human-readable name shown in the UI.

description.description: One or two sentences describing the volunteer role and its importance.

icon.description: A single emoji that represents this role.

color.description: Tailwind color name used for theming the module card and game screen.

knowledge.description: Core facts, procedures, and guidelines volunteers must understand.

title.description: Short heading for this knowledge item.

content.description: Full explanation of the concept, procedure, or policy. Write in plain language as if briefing a new volunteer.

tags.description: Optional labels for filtering or emphasis. Use values like 'critical', 'procedure', 'policy', 'safety', 'escalation', 'communication'.

rules.description: Short, non-negotiable policies the volunteer must always follow. Each rule is a single sentence.

glossary.description: Event-specific terms or jargon a volunteer needs to know.
